title: Pourthiaea tsaii

It is a genus of flowering plants, and Pourthiaea tsaii is one of the species within this genus. The classification of Pourthiaea tsaii is further supported by its botanical name, which follows the binomial nomenclature system established by Carl Linnaeus. This system categorizes plants into kingdom, family, genus, species, and other ranks.
